Provenance.drafts: 4 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP (single pass, no escalation needed); curated per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: c3 (seed+3) -- single centered stone archway with an ornate iron gate door, cross above, water pooling at the threshold, plain dark neutral background, very clean silhouette. c0/c1 were multi-view concept sheets (rejected -- not single subject); c2 was a strong single-subject alternate (a smaller shrine-like aedicula) kept as a backup. Full chain: cutout.py --trim (BiRefNet) -> normalmap.py 2.5 (Sobel).
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse, background-removed via BiRefNet (cutout.py --trim); normal map derived via normalmap.py (Sobel height-from-luminance, strength 2.5) -- lit Building world sprite per AssetSpec.NormalMap=true. Normal-map QA (bumps brighten toward a swept PointLight2D, windowed pilot scene) passed with the existing Flip-Y-OFF import convention. PaletteId fixed from 'house' to 'crypt' for this asset and sunkencrypt-backdrop (see sunkencrypt-backdrop.build.json note).
